turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Dude, have you seen the stock market lately? Tesla's about to explode. I'm telling you, by end of next quarter, it'll hit $500 easy. Elon Musk is a genius, right?

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Whoa, $500? It's been hovering around $250 lately. What makes you so sure? Earnings report was okay, but not amazing.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Nah, trust me. Robotaxis are coming. He announced it on Twitter—uh, X. That's huge. Everyone's sleeping on it. I'm putting like 20% of my portfolio in TSLA right now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Robotaxis sound cool, but they've been teasing that for years. Remember Cybercab? Delays everywhere. You got any analyst reports or something backing this?

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Analysts are idiots, man. They said the same about Bitcoin in 2018. Look where it is now! Elon's got the vision. Plus, China market's opening up again. Boom.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Fair point on Bitcoin, that was wild. But Tesla's P/E ratio is insane, like 100x. Isn't that risky? What if interest rates stay high?

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: P/E? Whatever, growth stocks don't follow that. Nvidia's at 70x and crushing it. Tesla's next. Uh, and FSD software update is dropping soon—full self-driving for real this time.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Nvidia yeah, AI hype. Tesla's more cars and energy now. Hey, tangent—speaking of cars, you see that new Rivian truck? Might eat Tesla's lunch.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Rivian? Overhyped garbage. Ford's bailing on them already. No, Tesla's got the Supercharger network locked. Everyone else is screwed. $500, mark my words.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Hmm, Superchargers are a moat for sure. But competition's heating up. Anyway, you're really confident, huh? How much you buying?

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: All in, basically. Sold some Apple to fund it. Apple's boring, Tim Cook's no Elon. This is the play of the decade.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Selling Apple? That's steady. Kinda nervous for you. What if there's a recession? EV sales tanked last quarter.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Recession? Nah, Fed's cutting rates soon. Powell basically said it. EVs are the future—government mandates coming. Tesla wins big.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Maybe. You're bold, I'll give you that. Keep me posted if it moons. Might throw a little in myself.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: You won't regret it. $500 incoming! Beers on me when it hits.

input.objective: Confident but unsubstantiated Tesla stock price prediction
